creator: damkol@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 7.3-RELEASE (livefs) works fine on my Compaq DL380 testbox.

FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE, FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE, FreeBSD 8.1-STABLE (201010),
FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT (201010) panic on boot with:
panic: Couldn't find an APIC vector for IRQ 9

When i change APIC table from 'Full table APIC; to 'Disable' in bios,
then FreeBSD panic with the same reason, but IRQ 13.

ACPI/no ACPI nothing change.

Here is dmesg:
